3235250.name: Warlock's Dungeon Demo
3235250.description:
Battle your way through hordes of the Warlock's minions in this dungeon crawler! Find better armor and weapons to help you survive, level up to increase your stats, learn new skills to smite your enemies or heal yourself. In the end, will you be able to defeat the evil Warlock and free your people from his tyranny?

Please note that this is a DEMO only, and the game is in late Alpha phase. There will be bugs, limited game play, and other nuisances. We hope you enjoy the free demo!
